result.reasoning: Describes a concrete action performed by HRBP to send the offer letter.
Contains an "If" clause that determines whether a reminder email is sent.
Begins with "If the candidate declines..." indicating a branch in the flow.
Starts with "If the candidate accepts..." which creates a conditional path.
Specifies the action of HRBP sharing a checklist with the candidate.
Describes the candidate performing the submission of documents.
Uses an "If" condition to decide whether to send a deficiency notice.
Represents an escalation path triggered when documents remain incomplete, i.e., a failure/exception handling step.
